CustomField.formula: If( NOT( ISBLANK(Name ) ), hyperlink( "https://sentryai.rubrik.com/cluster/" + Name + "/","https://sentryai.rubrik.com/cluster/" + Name + "/"), If( NOT (ISBLANK( account__c ) ) , hyperlink("https://sentryai.rubrik.com/account/" + CASESAFEID(account__c ) + "/","https://sentryai.rubrik.com/account/" + CASESAFEID(account__c ) + "/"), Null))
CustomField.label: SentryAI URL
